title: Vietnamese Pho
description: A traditional Vietnamese noodle soup with a rich broth and flavorful toppings.
instructions: 1. In a large pot, combine pork bones, garlic, onion, and ginger. Roast at 400°F (200°C) for 30 minutes.
2. Add pho seasoning and fish sauce (if using) to the pot. Pour in beef broth and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for at least 1 hour.
4. Cook pho noodles according to package instructions.
5. Slice cooked pork into thin strips.
6. Assemble pho bowls by placing noodles in the bottom, then adding sliced pork and hot broth.
7. Garnish with chopped herbs (such as cilantro or basil) and serve immediately.
